messages.content: Hi my name is Sophia, can you tell me about Mitchell Chase Johnson's early life?
Mitchell Chase Johnson was born in Seattle on November 29, 1986. He is the son of former NBA player John Johnson, who won the 1979 NBA Finals with the Seattle SuperSonics, and Jenny Redman.
That's interesting, what about his high school career, did you coach him?

I didn't coach him, but according to the document, Johnson played for O'Dea High School under coach Phil Lumpkin, where he was the team captain. During his time at O'Dea, he was a four-time All-Metro selection, three-time All-area honor, two-time All-State, an MVP of state tournament and Metro Conference MVP.
What about his college career, where did he play?
Johnson played at Stanford University for the Cardinal from 2005 to 2009. He graduated with a degree in sociology.
Hi my name is Sophia, can you tell me when you were hired as an assistant coach for the San Antonio Spurs?
I was hired as an assistant coach for the San Antonio Spurs on September 20, 2019.
That's great, how many times have you served as the interim head coach of the Spurs?
I have served as the interim head coach of the Spurs three times.
You were promoted to become the head coach of the Spurs, can you tell me when that happened?
I was promoted to become the head coach of the Spurs on May 2, 2025, following Gregg Popovich's decision to step down after 29 seasons.
Hi my name is Sophia. Can you tell me what's going on with your website? I'm getting an error code: 0.337c4117.1781776544.370ffcc1
I apologize for the inconvenience. It looks like you're experiencing a technical issue. The document suggests trying a different browser to resolve the issue.
That's really frustrating. Do you know what's causing this error?
I don't know the specific cause of the error, but the document recommends switching to a different browser as a potential solution.
Yes, I am the Johnson & Johnson Assistant, and I'm here to help with any questions you may have about our company or operations.
